title: Greener Pastures
description: A cozier minecraft, with farming, building, and multiplayer in mind.
body:
Welcome to Greener Pastures! I hope you enjoy your time here, as there is boundless opportunity to grow within this world! Whether you prefer to settle down and live a quiet life of serenity among the trees, pack your bags and embark on a long and adventurous journey, build a small and satisfied village, or conquer the world and sieze its riches, this pack has something for you. Love has been poured into crafting a cozy, relaxing, and engaging experience. Appreciation, feedback, and concerns are all welcome.


Current Planned Features:
  Quests
